title: ctenopteris longiuscula
intro: Ctenopteris longiuscula, also known as the New Zealand maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris longiuscula are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
